title: Parallel Execution of Promises for Individual Results Retrieval
titleCn: 并行执行 Promise 以获取独有的结果

detail.title: Parallel Execution of Promises for Individual Results Retrieval
detail.exampleTestcases:
[() => new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(() => resolve(15), 100))]
[() => new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(() => resolve(20), 100)), () => new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(() => resolve(15), 100))]
[() => new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(() => resolve(30), 200)), () => new Promise((resolve, reject) => setTimeout(() => reject("Error"), 100))]
